# KubeRocketCI Documentation

> Explore KubeRocketCI Documentation for CI/CD, operator and user guides, quick start, and API. Learn how to enhance your DevOps practices with KubeRocketCI.

This file contains links to documentation sections following the llmstxt.org standard.

## Table of Contents

- [About the KubeRocketCI Platform](https://docs.kuberocketci.io/docs/about-platform): Introduction to KubeRocketCI, an open-source cloud-agnostic SaaS/PaaS solution for software development, highlighting its features, architecture, a...
- [Basic Concepts](https://docs.kuberocketci.io/docs/basic-concepts): Overview of the core features and capabilities of the KubeRocketCI platform, including CI/CD for microservices, VCS integration, branching strategy...
- [Compliance](https://docs.kuberocketci.io/docs/compliance): An overview of KubeRocketCI's commitment to compliance with security standards, demonstrating the platform's adherence to rigorous third-party audi...
- [Annotations and Labels](https://docs.kuberocketci.io/docs/developer-guide/annotations-and-labels): Guide on the usage of labels and annotations in KubeRocketCI for resource interaction, monitoring, and governance within a Kubernetes cluster.
- [Verification of KubeRocketCI Artifacts](https://docs.kuberocketci.io/docs/developer-guide/artifacts-verification): Learn how to verify the authenticity and provenance of KubeRocketCI artifacts using SLSA framework, rekor-cli, and cosign for enhanced supply chain...
- [Quality Control](https://docs.kuberocketci.io/docs/developer-guide/autotest-coverage): Discover how KubeRocketCI ensures product quality through advanced tools, best practices, and comprehensive automated test coverage for all functio...
- [KubeRocketCI Deployment on AWS](https://docs.kuberocketci.io/docs/developer-guide/aws-deployment-diagram): Explore the architecture and deployment strategy of KubeRocketCI on AWS, leveraging services like EKS, EC2, Route 53 for scalable and secure CI/CD ...
- [AWS Infrastructure Cost Estimation](https://docs.kuberocketci.io/docs/developer-guide/aws-infrastructure-cost-estimation): A detailed guide for estimating AWS infrastructure costs for KubeRocketCI, including component descriptions, purposes, and approximate monthly costs.
- [KubeRocketCI Reference Architecture on AWS](https://docs.kuberocketci.io/docs/developer-guide/aws-reference-architecture): Explore the scalable and secure reference architecture of KubeRocketCI on AWS, utilizing AWS Managed Services for efficient CI/CD processes.
- [Working With Documentation](https://docs.kuberocketci.io/docs/developer-guide/documentation-guide): A comprehensive guide to developing KubeRocketCI documentation with Docusaurus, covering prerequisites, local development, and deployment.
- [KubeRocketCI Contribution](https://docs.kuberocketci.io/docs/developer-guide/edp-workflow): Guidelines for contributing to KubeRocketCI, including project rules, working process with GitHub and Jira, and commit message conventions.
- [KubeRocketCI Developer Guide: Architecture, Components, and Contribution Workflow](https://docs.kuberocketci.io/docs/developer-guide): A comprehensive guide for developers on KubeRocketCI's architecture, core components, and contribution workflow, including technical resources and ...
- [Kubernetes Deployment](https://docs.kuberocketci.io/docs/developer-guide/kubernetes-deployment): Explore the deployment approach of KubeRocketCI on Kubernetes, highlighting the operator pattern approach, component overview, and platform's core ...
- [Operator Development](https://docs.kuberocketci.io/docs/developer-guide/local-development): Learn how to set up your local environment for KubeRocketCI operator development with Go language, including IDE setup, pre-commit activities, test...
- [Reference Architecture](https://docs.kuberocketci.io/docs/developer-guide/reference-architecture): Explore the KubeRocketCI Reference Architecture, a blueprint for efficient and high-quality software development on Kubernetes, highlighting securi...
- [Reference CI/CD Pipeline](https://docs.kuberocketci.io/docs/developer-guide/reference-cicd-pipeline): A comprehensive guide to the CI/CD pipeline architecture within KubeRocketCI, detailing stages from source code to deployment with a focus on secur...
- [Telemetry](https://docs.kuberocketci.io/docs/developer-guide/telemetry): Overview of the telemetry data collection by the KubeRocketCI codebase operator, including the types of data collected and instructions on how to d...

- [Custom Certificates](https://docs.kuberocketci.io/docs/operator-guide/advanced-installation/custom-certificates): Learn how to add custom certificates to KubeRocketCI and configure Keycloak for secure component communication and enhanced platform security.

- [AWS EKS OIDC Integration](https://docs.kuberocketci.io/docs/operator-guide/auth/eks-oidc-integration): Comprehensive guide on integrating Keycloak with AWS EKS for OIDC authentication, enhancing security with Single Sign-On capabilities.
